caption: A group of people are seated in a lecture hall or conference room, facing forward. In the foreground, a woman with blonde hair wears a white blazer and sits behind a laptop featuring a glowing Apple logo. Next to her, a man wearing glasses, a white shirt, a striped tie, and a dark blazer sits with his hand resting on his chin in a contemplative pose. Both have name tags pinned to their clothing, though the text is illegible. Behind them, two other women are visible: one in a dark blazer and another in a dark blazer over a floral-patterned shirt. The scene remains virtually static across the sequence, with the individuals maintaining their seated positions and facial expressions, indicating a moment of focused listening or observation during a presentation.
